# USGS Water Services — Data Agreement

## Provider
U.S. Geological Survey (USGS), Department of the Interior

## URL
https://waterservices.usgs.gov/

## Terms of Service URL
https://waterservices.usgs.gov/ (terms on service page); https://www.usgs.gov/information-policies-and-instructions/copyrights-and-credits

## License
Public Domain (US government data)

## Data We Collect
Real-time and historical water data including streamflow (discharge), water levels, water temperature, and water quality parameters from USGS monitoring stations via the Water Services API (Instantaneous Values, Daily Values, Site Service).

## How We Use It
Environmental infrastructure signal in DRM3 products. Water data provides geographic and environmental context, particularly for monitoring natural resource conditions and infrastructure near water systems.

## Commercial Use
Yes. Public domain data with no restrictions on commercial use.

## Redistribution
Yes. Public domain data may be freely redistributed in any form.

## Attribution Required
No. Public domain data has no enforceable attribution requirement. USGS requests citation: "U.S. Geological Survey, [year], National Water Information System data available on the World Wide Web (USGS Water Data for the Nation)." We honor this as good practice.

## Rate Limits
- No API key required
- No documented hard rate limits
- USGS requests that automated requests be limited to reasonable frequency
- Large queries should use appropriate date ranges and site filters

## Key Restrictions
- No restrictions on data use
- Provisional data is clearly marked -- do not represent provisional data as final/verified
- Do not misrepresent derived data as official USGS assessments

## Last Reviewed
2026-04-02
